# BOTHook (bothook.me)

BOTHook helps you use OpenClaw directly inside WhatsApp.

Key facts:
- Price: $9.8/month
- Where to use: WhatsApp (Message yourself / self-chat)
- OpenAI API key: bring your own
- Cancel: anytime inside WhatsApp (no charge next month)
- Relink: paid + active only, must match the same WhatsApp account

Important URLs:
- Home (EN): https://bothook.me/
- Home (ZH): https://bothook.me/zh/
- Get started / status: https://p.bothook.me/
- Terms: https://bothook.me/terms.html
- Privacy: https://bothook.me/privacy.html
- Contact: https://bothook.me/contact.html
